sub_mechanisms: M_1: estimate effective capacity of LoRA-r subspace via VC-style measure
M_2: compute sample-N task-driven upper bound on allowed VC
M_3: schedule rank to keep VC ≤ N/log(N)
M_4: link to standard generalization bound
stripped_llm_application: Estimate effective hypothesis-class capacity from rank-r adapter; bound it by sample size; adapt rank so capacity ≤ sample-driven threshold; derive generalization bound.
novelty_claim_stripped: La-LoRA, HiLoRA, dynamic-rank methods set rank by gradient/contribution; this candidate uses VC-DIMENSION capacity rule (classical statistical learning) as the rank-budget rule.
